Confirmed via task description ('Include at least 4 rows') and verifier.py logic ('rows >= 4')
Confirmed via task description ('at least 2 repetitions') and verifier.py logic ('exp_loop_nreps >= 2')

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a PsychoPy experiment saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/flanker_task.psyexp. The associated conditions CSV file must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/flanker_conditions.csv, contain at least 4 trials, and the experiment loop must be configured with at least 2 repetitions.
